rawMetadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.33+commit.64118f21"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"spender","type":"address"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"amount","type":"uint256"}],"name":"approve","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"account","type":"address"}],"name":"balanceOf","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"to","type":"address"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"amount","type":"uint256"}],"name":"transfer","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"from","type":"address"},{"internalType":"address","name":"to","type":"address"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"amount","type":"uint256"}],"name":"transferFrom","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"AgentVault","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Holds user funds and only allows the agent to trade through AgentGuardRouter.         The agent CANNOT withdraw or bypass the router \u2014 guardrails are enforced by design. Flow: 1. Owner (human) deploys vault, specifying their agent and the router 2. Owner deposits ETH/ERC20 into the vault 3. Owner sets policy on AgentPolicy contract (max trade size, daily limit) 4. Agent calls vault.executeSwap() \u2014 vault routes through AgentGuardRouter 5. Router checks policy via AgentPolicy.enforceAndRecord() 6. If allowed \u2192 swap executes, output tokens return to vault 7. If over limits \u2192 reverts, nothing moves 8. Only owner can withdraw funds from the vault Key guarantee: The agent never holds the funds. It can only trade them through the one path that checks the policy. No bypass possible.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/AgentVault.sol":"IERC20"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":false,"runs":200},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"]},"sources":{"src/AgentPolicy.sol":{"keccak256":"0xa6d91d34f288767e3ae23576a6c39471c48542216bdb3876425816ce002d8569","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://fa1e850d0e40f5346cb9b0186dd7e5bfafc84f0af8e8fd492baaf289962b4fe0","dweb:/ipfs/QmQUondmKChSjj4r8QkJC4RP6JQeSk6jeokg1o16cZzsVY"]},"src/AgentVault.sol":{"keccak256":"0x59685140c70e61b7de7235c4ae42e6b575927061e969c6b39b11379bb606df12","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://f4cfee4bfe76d634b7088bdb7922d07e153dc558da3fce1ce5a6599befbcfdff","dweb:/ipfs/QmVqV1KGknsuuUTX5MTLbmeDP9dpoqAQ54sNHwyuKUhCkv"]}},"version":1}
